About Me

I am an IT undergraduate at Universiti Tun Hussein Onn Malaysia with hands-on experience in technical support, leadership, and multimedia content creation. I thrive on solving IT problems, optimizing systems, and delivering creative solutions using technology.

More About Me

What I Do

IT Support

Providing technical assistance and troubleshooting to resolve hardware and software issues.

Networking

Configuring and maintaining network infrastructure to ensure seamless connectivity.

Multimedia

Creating engaging visual content, including graphics, videos, and other digital media.

Featured Projects

Rumah Tenang - Your Authentic Malaysian Escape

Landing Page
HTML CSS JS

A responsive landing page for a Malaysian homestay business targeting foreign tourists and vacationers. Features an interactive image gallery showcasing local attractions and a contact form for booking inquiries.

View Project

Nasi Lemak Burger

Landing Page
HTML CSS JS

A dynamic promotional landing page featuring a countdown timer that resets on each visit, creating urgency for limited-time food promotions. Designed to drive immediate customer action and boost conversions.

View Project
Healthy Food App

✨ Features

Healthy Food App

Mobile App
Flutter Dart Firebase

A comprehensive mobile app for healthy meal planning featuring recipe generation, local shop delivery integration, and premium subscription plans for personalized diet meal plans.
